\tzpentry{ID4633}{Magnetic Helicity Definition}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4633 introduces Magnetic Helicity Definition as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \mathcal{M}^H(x) := H\left( \sum s_i(x) \log s_i(x) \right)$ \]
